title: Community Moderation Update: 2026-04-29
body:
Today we took action against two high-severity abusive accounts:
1. spam_wave_42: Banned for posting phishing links across 6 community channels
2. toxic_runner: Banned for repeated targeted harassment of new members

The high-severity report against core_maintainer was confirmed as a false positive resulting from a brigading campaign, and has been closed with no action taken.

We remain committed to keeping our community safe for all participants. If you encounter abusive behavior, please use the report function to bring it to our attention.
